message:
Update remaining kubestellar/klaude repo refs to kubestellar/kubestellar-mcp

The GitHub repo kubestellar/klaude has been renamed to
kubestellar/kubestellar-mcp. This updates the three remaining
references in edit URLs, source repo mappings, and marketplace
plugin config.

Historical git branch names (docs/klaude/0.x.x) are left unchanged
as they are immutable references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
